name: American Jewelry & Loan - Hazel Park
description_short: American Jewelry & Loan is a Detroit-based pawn shop operating since 1978, offering collateral loans, buying, and selling of jewelry, electronics, tools, and valuables across multiple Michigan locations.
description_long:
American Jewelry and Loan was established in 1978 and has grown into one of the largest and most recognizable pawn shop chains in the world. The company operates four locations across Michigan: Detroit (flagship), Hazel Park, Pontiac, and Southgate. The Detroit flagship location gained significant public recognition as the setting for the reality television show "Hardcore Pawn," which brought mainstream attention to the pawn industry and the company's operations.

The company offers three primary services: pawn loans (collateral-based loans on jewelry, electronics, tools, and other items), buying of valuables at fair market value, and retail purchasing of pre-owned items at below-retail prices. Their inventory includes GIA certified diamonds, luxury handbags, fine jewelry, timepieces, electronics, and equipment. Customers can access pawn loans as an alternative to traditional lending, sell items for cash, or purchase quality secondhand goods at discounted prices.

American Jewelry & Loan distinguishes itself through its established reputation built over 45+ years, multi-location presence in the Detroit metro area, online appointment booking capability, and association with the popular "Hardcore Pawn" television series. The company maintains active social media presence and offers a newsletter signup. Their website indicates they handle GIA certified diamonds and luxury goods, suggesting a focus on higher-value items compared to some competitors.

As a pawn shop, American Jewelry & Loan provides short-term collateral-based lending without credit checks, making it accessible to consumers with poor credit or those seeking fast cash. However, pawn loans carry implicit costs through the redemption period requirements and potential loss of personal items if loans aren't repaid. The business model is legitimate and legal, though customers should understand that pawning items means risking loss of collateral and that interest rates implicit in the redemption terms may be significant.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Established 45+ year history as Detroit institution with strong local brand recognition
Multiple convenient Michigan locations (Detroit, Hazel Park, Pontiac, Southgate)
No credit check required for pawn loans—accessible to consumers with poor credit
Handles high-value items including GIA certified diamonds and luxury goods
Fast cash availability without lengthy application or approval processes
Can sell items directly for fair market value or purchase discounted secondhand goods
Online appointment booking available; extended hours (9:30am-6pm Mon-Sat)
cons: Pawn loans require surrendering personal items as collateral, with risk of permanent loss if not redeemed
Interest rates on pawn loans, while not disclosed on website, are typically high relative to traditional lending
Limited to physical Michigan locations; no online pawn loan application process evident
Closed Sundays, limiting accessibility for some consumers
Pawn model inherently favors quick cash needs over long-term financial solutions
best_for: Consumers needing fast cash without credit checks or lengthy approval processes
People with poor credit history who cannot qualify for traditional personal loans
Sellers of jewelry, electronics, or valuables seeking immediate payment at fair market value
Bargain shoppers seeking quality secondhand items at below-retail prices
diagnosis: American Jewelry & Loan is best for consumers who need immediate cash and have collateral (jewelry, electronics, tools) they're willing to pledge, or who seek bargain purchases of secondhand luxury items. The main caveat is that pawn loans require surrendering personal possessions with genuine risk of loss, and the implicit costs (redemption requirements, high interest terms) make this suitable for emergency short-term needs rather than ongoing credit building.
services: Pawn loans on jewelry, electronics, tools, and personal valuables
Selling valuables to company for fair market value cash
Purchasing pre-owned items at fraction of retail price
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 20804 John R Rd, Hazel Park, MI 48030
